title: avena muralis
intro: Avena muralis, also known as Wild Oats or Green Oats, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Avena muralis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
